entities.name: Hiring Bias Reduction Through Non-Adversarial Recruitment
entities.context: V's belief that reducing hiring bias requires dismantling adversarial dynamics rather than using blind algorithms

entities.name: Partner-Explorer Collaboration
entities.context: Alternative recruitment dynamic where recruiter and candidate work together rather than in opposition

entities.name: Gatekeeper-Applicant Struggle
entities.context: The traditional adversarial dynamic in recruitment that V sees as the root cause of bias

entities.name: Defensive Signaling
entities.context: Behavior triggered in adversarial systems where candidates present curated masks rather than true capabilities

entities.name: Prestige Brand Proxies
entities.context: Safe proxies like prestigious company names used to mitigate hiring risk, identified as primary carriers of systemic bias

entities.name: Coaching-Led Interaction
entities.context: Non-adversarial approach that increases psychological safety in recruitment

entities.name: Psychological Safety
entities.context: State that allows candidates to present true capabilities rather than curated presentations

entities.name: Proxy-Based Evaluation
entities.context: Box-checking approach to hiring that relies on biased signals

entities.name: Insight-Based Evaluation
entities.context: Understanding-potential approach that bypasses bias mechanisms

entities.name: Adversarial Gap
entities.context: Core problem in hiring systems that V believes must be solved

entities.name: DE&I Compliance Algorithms
entities.context: Traditional bias-correction tools that V believes may become obsolete

entities.name: Blind Algorithms
entities.context: Approach to bias reduction that V explicitly rejects as ineffective

relationships.context: Proposed replacement for the adversarial recruitment dynamic
Adversarial systems trigger defensive behavior in candidates
Defensive signaling leads to reliance on safe, biased proxies
Non-adversarial coaching approach enables psychological safety
Safety enables true capability presentation, shifting to insight-based hiring
Box-checking evaluation relies on biased proxy signals
Understanding-potential approach fundamentally bypasses proxy-based bias
Solving the adversarial gap may render traditional DE&I tools obsolete

relationships.to: Hiring Bias Reduction Through Non-Adversarial Recruitment
relationships.context: V rejects blind algorithms in favor of dismantling adversarial dynamics
